findings.description: The en translation of the sample-spread caption renders ❼❽❾ as '7. Question, 8. Answer, and 9. Explanation' using Arabic numerals instead of circled numbers. This is an acceptable normalization for the English user-facing surface; the mapping is unambiguous.

reviewer_notes: Four entities cover all page content: intro paragraph, sample RAID/dual-system/thin-client spread figure, three-row legend table (❼問題 ❽解答 ❾解説), and the bottom boxed note on incorrect-choice value. jp surfaces match the image exactly; zh/en translations are accurate. The single low-severity finding is a numeral-style normalization, not a content error.
